title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at RINL

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at RINL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, RINL in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL:
RINL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL!
